form.formComment: Gai Waterhouse & Adrian Bott trained two-year-old colt lining up for first race start. Looked good when an easy trial winner. Stable has an impressive strike rate with the first-starters.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gai Waterhouse & Adrian Bott trained two-year-old colt lining up for first race start. Looked good when an easy trial winner. Stable has an impressive strike rate with the first-starters.

form.formComment: Colt by Zoustar on debut. Was runner-up in a trial at Rosehill on March 10 over 900m. Well bred colt who must be kept safe from the sticky gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Colt by Zoustar on debut. Was runner-up in a trial at Rosehill on March 10 over 900m. Well bred colt who must be kept safe from the sticky gate.

form.formComment: Two-year-old colt (Wild Ruler - Incredulous Dream) will no doubt benefit from the four trials leading in today's debut. Won a trial at Warwick Farm over 818m March 30. Solid trial performer who will need to overcome the sticky gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old colt (Wild Ruler - Incredulous Dream) will no doubt benefit from the four trials leading in today's debut. Won a trial at Warwick Farm over 818m March 30. Solid trial performer who will need to overcome the sticky gate.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Two-year-old filly by Time To Reign out of Thiwlig. At the most recent trial finished eighth at Hawkesbury over 800m. Would prefer to see her perform on race day before recommending.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Facing the starter for the first time. Two-year-old filly by Time To Reign out of Thiwlig. At the most recent trial finished eighth at Hawkesbury over 800m. Would prefer to see her perform on race day before recommending.

form.formComment: First starter by Anders out of Tumbling Dice. Has a total of three trials leading in today's debut. Well drawn for debut and goes into the exotics.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Anders out of Tumbling Dice. Has a total of three trials leading in today's debut. Well drawn for debut and goes into the exotics.

form.formComment: Two-year-old filly (Frankel - Adoringly) will no doubt benefit from the three trials leading in today's debut. Was third in a Rosehill barrier trial over 900m on April 2. Has shown enough in her last two trials and not to be overlooked.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old filly (Frankel - Adoringly) will no doubt benefit from the three trials leading in today's debut. Was third in a Rosehill barrier trial over 900m on April 2. Has shown enough in her last two trials and not to be overlooked.

form.formComment: Filly by The Autumn Sun facing the starter for the first time. Trialled on March 27 at Randwick over 1050m and finished seventh. Had the three mixed trials and sure to be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by The Autumn Sun facing the starter for the first time. Trialled on March 27 at Randwick over 1050m and finished seventh. Had the three mixed trials and sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Filly by Wootton Bassett making her first race start. Has looked handy in two trials leading into this. Won a Rosehill trial over 900m on April 2. Impressed in both trials and the claim helps, respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Wootton Bassett making her first race start. Has looked handy in two trials leading into this. Won a Rosehill trial over 900m on April 2. Impressed in both trials and the claim helps, respect.

form.formComment: Two-year-old filly (Blue Point - Deity). Anthony & Sam Freedman has her primed for this with three recent trials leading in today's debut. Won her most recent trial at Randwick over 740m on March 16. Expected to measure up.

form.formComment: Filly by I Am Invincible making her first appearance. Was runner-up in a trial at Rosehill on April 2 over 900m. Can't be ignored after the two latest trials.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by I Am Invincible making her first appearance. Was runner-up in a trial at Rosehill on April 2 over 900m. Can't be ignored after the two latest trials.

form.formComment: First starter by I Am Invincible colt from the Chris Waller yard. Was runner-up in a trial at Rosehill on April 2 over 1030m. Nice type who looks tested from the gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by I Am Invincible colt from the Chris Waller yard. Was runner-up in a trial at Rosehill on April 2 over 1030m. Nice type who looks tested from the gate.

form.formComment: Colt by Snitzel making his first appearance. Runner-up in a Rosehill trial over 900m on April 2. Expensive colt not to be overlooked.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Colt by Snitzel making his first appearance. Runner-up in a Rosehill trial over 900m on April 2. Expensive colt not to be overlooked.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Warwick Farm 2yo C&G Mdn on March 11 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind The Next Episode with 58kg at $5.50. Second-up 3rd of 10 at Randwick Kensington 2yo C&G Osc on March 25 over 1100m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Under Focus with 56kg at $9. Key runner with race experience on his side, go close.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start hampered when forced wider by Satoshi.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
